no: Diablo 2 Druid kit for Druid class. Human, Half-elf. Elemental spellcasting, werewolf/werebear shapeshifting, summoned animal companions. Elemental spells (except Armageddon) unavailable while shapeshifted. Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

conflicts.reason: Both include Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons — installing both is redundant but not harmful

activated.effects: Firestorm, Molten Boulder, Arctic Blast, Fissure, Twister, Tornado, Armageddon.
Werewolf and Werebear forms with escalating bonuses through lv15.

restrictions.items: Cannot cast elemental spells while transformed (except Armageddon). Shapeshift bonuses cap at lv15. No dual-class.

new: Diablo 2-inspired shapeshifter. Elemental magic, summoning, and beast forms.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Druid kit for the Druid class. Human, Half-elf. Elemental spellcasting, werewolf/werebear shapeshifting, and summoned animal companions.

co.n: Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons (From cdtweaks)
co.tp2n: Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons (From cdtweaks)
